data.content: Planning complete for Codex project-level managed skills. Implement by adding `./.agents` as the preferred Codex root in `src/managed_skills.rs`, keeping `~/.codex` as fallback, then extend `src/managed_skills_tests.rs` to cover project-preferred install, user fallback, doctor detection, doctor --fix reconciliation, updated root counts, and updated hint text. No child knots were created because the scope is small and localized. Validate with focused managed-skills tests and `make sanity` during the implementation step.
